heroSubtext: Your dedicated Clarity and Mindset Coach, committed to helping you unlock your potential and create the life you've always dreamed of.
storyHeading: Clarity, Mindset, and Transformation – My Story
storyParagraph1: Shanila, an accomplished coach with a ten year track record, possesses a deep understanding of coaching methodologies, guiding individuals to achieve personal and professional goals. Committed to continuous learning and known for her empathetic approach, she empowers clients to overcome challenges and unlock their potential. Her dedicated coaching experience reflects a commitment to excellence and passion for positive change.
storyParagraph2: Trained by internationally acclaimed coach (Global Guru) Vikram Dhar, Shanila's coaching approach is infused with a global perspective and proven methodologies, enabling her to drive impactful transformations. Boasting diverse credentials, including a Master Practitioner in NLP, Certified Emotional Intelligence Practitioner, ICF qualified Associate Certified Coach, and Vedic Numerologist.
credentialsSubtext: I'm committed to continuous learning and professional development to provide you with the best coaching experience.

credentials.title: Master Practitioner in NLP
credentials.description: Advanced certification in Neuro-Linguistic Programming techniques for personal transformation and behavioral change.

credentials.title: Certified Emotional Intelligence Practitioner
credentials.description: Specialized training in understanding and applying emotional intelligence for personal and professional growth.

credentials.title: ICF Qualified Associate Certified Coach
credentials.description: International Coaching Federation accredited coach, meeting the highest standards of professional coaching practice.

credentials.title: Vedic Numerologist
credentials.description: Certified in Vedic Numerology to provide deep insights into life paths, relationships, and personal patterns.

values.title: Clarity
values.description: I help you cut through the noise and find the clear path that aligns with who you truly are and what you genuinely want.

values.title: Authenticity
values.description: I believe in honest, real conversations. No judgment, no pretense — just genuine support for your unique journey.

values.title: Empowerment
values.description: My goal is to empower you with the tools, mindset, and confidence to take decisive action and create lasting change.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: I approach every coaching relationship with deep empathy and understanding, meeting you exactly where you are.

ctaSubtext: Book a free Clarity Call and let's explore how coaching can help you create the change you're seeking.
